  • Uses of CARD_TYPE in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.RMI

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.RMI that return CARD_TYPE
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CARD_TYPE
    ClientVirtualView.getBottomCardType(int position)
    Returns bottom card type.
    CARD_TYPE
    ClientVirtualView.getTopCardType(int position)
    Returns top card type.
    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.RMI with parameters of type CARD_TYPE
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ServerRemoteInterface.selectCardFromBottomList(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Selects a card from the bottom market row and adds it to the player's tribe.
    void
    ServerRemoteInterface.selectCardFromTopList(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Selects a card from the top market row and adds it to the player's tribe.
    void
    ServerRemoteInterface.selectExtraCard(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Selects one extra card from the market, triggered by the draw-one-more building effect.

  • Uses of CARD_TYPE in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.Socket

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.Socket with parameters of type CARD_TYPE
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ServerSocketProxy.selectCardFromBottomList(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Sends a request to draw a card from the bottom market list.
    void
    ServerSocketProxy.selectCardFromTopList(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Sends a request to draw a card from the top market list.
    void
    ServerSocketProxy.selectExtraCard(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Sends a request to draw an extra card and blocks until the server confirms success or sends back an error.

  • Uses of CARD_TYPE in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.Socket.messages

    Constructors in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.Socket.messages with parameters of type CARD_TYPE
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    SelectCardFromBottomListMessage(PlayerDTO playerDTO, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Creates a message requesting a card draw from the bottom market row.
     
    SelectCardFromTopListMessage(PlayerDTO playerDTO, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Creates a message requesting a card draw from the top market row.
     
    SelectExtraCardMessage(PlayerDTO playerDTO, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Creates a message requesting an extra card draw.

  • Uses of CARD_TYPE in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Card

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected CARD_TYPE
    Card.cardType
    The type of this card (tribe member role, building, or event).
    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Card that return CARD_TYPE
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CARD_TYPE
    Card.getCardType()
    Returns the type of this card (tribe role, building, or event).
    Constructors in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Card with parameters of type CARD_TYPE
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    ArtistCard(ERA era, CARD_TYPE cardType)
    Creates a new ArtistCard for the specified era and card type.
     
    BuilderCard(ERA era, CARD_TYPE cardType, int foodDiscount, int finalPrestigePoint, int builderID)
    Creates a new BuilderCard with the given attributes.
     
    BuildingCard(ERA era, CARD_TYPE cardType, int buildingID, int foodCost, int endgamePP, EVENT_TYPE applyOn)
    Creates a new BuildingCard with the given attributes.
     
    EventCard(ERA era, CARD_TYPE cardType, int eventID, EVENT_TYPE eventType)
    Constructor without a bound effect; call EventCard.setEventEffect(EventEffect) before triggering.
     
    EventCard(ERA era, CARD_TYPE cardType, int eventID, EVENT_TYPE eventType, EventEffect eventEffect)
    Creates a new EventCard with a pre-bound effect strategy.
     
    GathererCard(ERA era, CARD_TYPE cardType)
    Creates a new GathererCard for the specified era and card type.
     
    HuntersCard(ERA era, CARD_TYPE cardType, boolean hasICON)
    Creates a new HuntersCard for the specified era and card type.
     
    InventorCard(ERA era, CARD_TYPE cardType, INV_ICON invIcon)
    Creates a new InventorCard for the specified era, card type, and icon.
     
    ShamanCard(ERA era, CARD_TYPE cardType, SHAMAN_STAR starNumber)
    Creates a new ShamanCard with the given era, card type, and star rating.

  • Uses of CARD_TYPE in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Controller

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Controller with parameters of type CARD_TYPE
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Controller.selectCardFromBottomList(Player player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Lets the player pick a tribe member or building from the previous-round (bottom) market row.
    void
    Controller.selectCardFromTopList(Player player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Lets the player pick a tribe member or building from the current-round (top) market row.
    void
    Controller.selectExtraCard(Player player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Resolves the bonus draw granted by the draw-one-more mechanic: picks the chosen card from the top market row and adds it to the player's tribe.

  • Uses of CARD_TYPE in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Effect.Building

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    DiscountFoodOnSustenance(CARD_TYPE cardType)
    Creates a DiscountFoodOnSustenance effect for the given card type.
     
    PPPerCharType(int prestigePoint, CARD_TYPE cardType)
    Creates a PPPerCharType effect.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    enum 
    CARD_TYPE
    All card types available in Mesos: tribe member roles, buildings, and events.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static CARD_TYPE
    CARD_TYPE.valueOf(String name)
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    static CARD_TYPE[]
    CARD_TYPE.values()

  • Uses of CARD_TYPE in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Game

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Game with parameters of type CARD_TYPE
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Game.selectExtraCardFromTopList(CARD_TYPE cardType, int position, Player player)
    Draws one extra card from the top market row for the given player without touching the offer-tile action counter.
    void
    Game.selectGenericCardBottomLists(CARD_TYPE toBuyCardType, int position, Player player)
    Selects a card from the bottom list and adds it to the player, then decrements the player's remaining bottom-draw actions.
    void
    Game.selectGenericCardTopLists(CARD_TYPE toBuyCardType, int position, Player player)
    this method adds a card from the top list

  • Uses of CARD_TYPE in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Observers

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Observers with parameters of type CARD_TYPE
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    MarketObserver.onCardRemovedFromBottom(int position, CARD_TYPE cardType)
    Called when a card is removed from the bottom market row.
    void
    MarketObserver.onCardRemovedFromTop(int position, CARD_TYPE cardType)
    Called when a card is removed from the top market row.

  • Uses of CARD_TYPE in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer with parameters of type CARD_TYPE
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ServerVirtualView.onCardRemovedFromBottom(int position, CARD_TYPE cardType)
    Removes the card or building at the given position from the bottom market row in the local snapshot and notifies the client of the removal.
    void
    ServerVirtualView.onCardRemovedFromTop(int position, CARD_TYPE cardType)
    Removes the card or building at the given position from the top market row in the local snapshot and notifies the client of the removal.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CARD_TYPE
    CardDTO.getCardType()
    Returns the type of this card (tribe role, building, or event).
    Constructors in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.DTOs with parameters of type CARD_TYPE
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    CardDTO(ERA era, int eventID, CARD_TYPE cardType)
    Constructs a CardDTO from EventCard.
     
    CardDTO(ERA era, CARD_TYPE cardType)
    Constructs a CardDTO with only the era and card type (no role-specific attributes).

  • Uses of CARD_TYPE in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.RMI

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.RMI with parameters of type CARD_TYPE
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ServerNetworkHandler.selectCardFromBottomList(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Lets the player pick a card from the previous-round (bottom) market row during the resolve-action phase.
    void
    ServerNetworkHandler.selectCardFromTopList(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Lets the player pick a card from the current-round (top) market row during the resolve-action phase.
    void
    ServerNetworkHandler.selectExtraCard(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Selects the bonus card granted by the draw-one-more mechanic (triggered after the server calls askExtraDraw on the client).
